title: A Wall Flower by Amy Levy — Love Poetry Lines
content:
I lounge in the doorway and languish in vain
While Tom, Dick and Harry are dancing with Jane


My spirit rises to the music's beat;
There is a leaden fiend lurks in my feet!
To move unto your motion, Love, were sweet.
meaning: "A Wall Flower" by Amy Levy is a love poem consisting of 19 lines. The poet explores themes of love through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "I lounge in the doorway and languish in vain While Tom, Dick and Harry are dancing with Jane...", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Amy Levy's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
